tagline: Australian autopilot-on-module flight controller supplier (Cube family) and precision RTK GNSS module provider, in production and Blue UAS certified. Manufacturing and assembly reportedly US-based. NDAA compliance status not publicly disclosed. GPS-denied navigation capability claimed but maturity undefined. Pixhawk ecosystem heritage noted; limited public contract evidence available.
